\begin{circuitikz}
    \draw (0,0)     node[op amp, yscale=-1] (opamp) {}
    (opamp.+)       to[short, -o] ++ (-1,0)
                    node[left] {$V_\text{in}$}
    (opamp.-)       -- ++(-0.5,0)
                    -- ++(0,-0.5)
                    node[ground]{}
    (opamp.out)     to[short, -o] ++(1,0)
                    node[right] {$V_\text{out}$};
\end{circuitikz}
